transactions_bank_requires_sub_location.name: transactions_bank_requires_sub_location
transactions_bank_requires_sub_location.value: "transactions"."deposit_location" IS DISTINCT FROM 'bank' OR "transactions"."sub_location_id" IS NOT NULL

fund_transfers_bank_requires_sub_locatio.name: fund_transfers_bank_requires_sub_location
fund_transfers_bank_requires_sub_locatio.value:
("fund_transfers"."from_location" IS DISTINCT FROM 'bank' OR "fund_transfers"."from_sub_location_id" IS NOT NULL)
       AND ("fund_transfers"."to_location" IS DISTINCT FROM 'bank' OR "fund_transfers"."to_sub_location_id" IS NOT NULL)
